authFlow.signupHeroTitle: Give your clients shortlists they can trust.
authFlow.signupHeroBody: Evaluate shortlisted candidates, compare structured evidence, and prepare client-ready recommendations — all from one focused dashboard.
authFlow.loginHeroTitle: Hire with clearer signals and cleaner workflows.
authFlow.loginHeroBody: Manage candidates, assessment links, results, and hiring projects from one focused dashboard.
authFlow.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
authFlow.accountExists: An account with this email already exists.
authFlow.confirmationEmailError: We could not send the confirmation email. Please try again.
authFlow.enterEmailPassword: Please enter your email and password.
authFlow.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address before signing in. Check your inbox.

authFlow.signinAgreement: By signing in, you agree to our
authFlow.resetPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
authFlow.resetLinkSent: Reset link sent! Check your inbox and follow the link to set a new password.
authFlow.validEmailRequired: Please enter a valid email address.
authFlow.resetEmailError: We could not send the reset email. Please try again.
authFlow.setNewPasswordDescription: Choose a strong password for your account.
authFlow.resetSessionError: We could not verify this reset link. Please request a new one.
authFlow.resetLinkInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
authFlow.passwordUpdateError: We could not update your password. Please try again.
authFlow.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to your email address. Click the link to activate your account and access your dashboard.
authFlow.checkSpam: Check your spam or junk folder
authFlow.confirmWorkEmail: Make sure you used your work email
authFlow.emailDelay: Confirmation emails can take up to 5 minutes
authFlow.missingEmailForResend: Open this page from signup or enter your email again to resend confirmation.

dashboard.briefAllClear: You're all caught up — nothing is waiting on you.

dashboard.noActiveProjectsBody: Create a project to start inviting candidates.
dashboard.noCandidatesInProject: No candidates yet — send the first invitation.
dashboard.activityEmpty: No activity yet. Invite candidates or wait for results to see updates here.
dashboard.startedBody: Follow these steps to run your first assessment project.
dashboard.step1Desc: Organize candidates by role, team, or use case.
dashboard.step2Desc: Pick tests from the library and add them to your project.
dashboard.step3Desc: Share a secure link — no account required.

dashboard.tileReviewedEmpty: nothing waiting on a next step

report.interpHigh: Performance well above the typical range for this assessment.
report.interpMedium: Solid performance within the expected range for this assessment.
report.interpLow: Performance below the typical range — worth exploring in an interview.
report.beatsShare: Scores higher than {pct}% of results in this project

billing.trialExpiredTitle: Your trial has ended. Upgrade your plan to continue.

billing.trialCandidatesAtLimit: You've used all {limit} free candidates — upgrade your plan to continue inviting candidates.
